theme.name: Performance Pro Hybrid
theme.archetype: Archetype 2 (The Performance Pro) mixed with Archetype 5 (Luxury)
theme.description: A dark, elite athletic UI combined with premium, high-end metallic touches for the player cards. Deep obsidian backgrounds contrast with pure white text, electric blaze accents, and rich gradient player cards.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8 for containers. Gap-8 for grids.
layout.pitch_grid: Use absolute positioning over a 100% width relative container with aspect ratio. Use percentage-based top/left to place players in formations like 4-3-3, 4-2-3-1, etc.

player_card.structure: FUT inspired. Not a simple rectangle. Use clip-path: polygon(10% 0, 90% 0, 100% 10%, 100% 100%, 50% 90%, 0 100%, 0 10%); or a glowing border box. Top-left: Overall and Position. Center: Letter Avatar (rounded-full, bright bg). Bottom: Name, Club monogram, Season, Flag.
player_card.effects: For Gold/Special/Ballon d'Or, use framer-motion to add a shimmer effect (animated linear gradient overlay) and box-shadow drop-shadows. Ballon d'Or gets a #FFD700 solid 1px border.

dice_button.effects: When clicked, show a 3D rotating dice animation via framer-motion (rotateX, rotateY) before revealing the drafted team/player.

pitch_view.structure: A green textured container (use the pitch image). Overlay white SVG lines for the football field. Players are represented as mini-cards or circular avatars placed via absolute top/left percentages based on selected formation.

match_ticker.structure: Football Manager style. A minimalist dark panel showing minute-by-minute text events. '74: GOAL! Messi scores.'
match_ticker.effects: Events fade in sequentially. Scoreboard at the top updates with a pulse effect on goal.

animations.dice_roll: rotate 3D, scale down and up, duration 1.5s, ease in out
animations.goal_pulse: scale(1.2), color shift to #10B981, return to normal

icons.usage: Use for UI elements (mute, settings, stats), not for player faces.

pitch_texture.description: Green grass texture for the pitch background.

dark_texture.description: Dark metallic abstract texture for high-end card backgrounds or main app background overlay.

trophy.description: Trophy image for the tournament winner screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all components use `data-testid` attributes as requested.
Implement the UI entirely in the frontend using React, standard Tailwind classes, and Framer Motion for animations.
Use standard `localStorage` to manage save state for the draft and tournament.
Follow the specific formation coordinates to map players to the pitch accurately.
Do not use external CSS for the pitch, rely on inline styles for absolute positioning or Tailwind classes if possible.
Create realistic FUT-style cards utilizing the CSS gradients provided in this JSON.
Make sure the typography combinations (Bebas Neue for Headings, Inter for Body) are loaded and applied correctly.
